findings.title: Prefix-check asymmetry between rule_id and tenant_id normalizers
findings.evidence: Claude confirmed both normalizers fail closed and no noncanonical input is accepted; the only difference is rejection-message branch.
findings.recommendation: No closeout action required. Optional future consistency cleanup may align error-message taxonomy.

findings.title: Status fields are coupled and must be flipped together at promotion
findings.evidence: Claude identified contract current_subphase, subphase_closeouts S03, ai_control_rule_tenant_scope_definition, AI_CONTROL_RULE_TENANT_SCOPE_POLICY, and the test assertion as the coupled promotion fields; registry phase status intentionally stays implemented.
findings.recommendation: Promote these fields atomically and keep CONTROL_PLANE_DOMAIN_MODEL_REGISTRY.status implemented.

parsed_review.review_notes: Independent C00 read-only review confirmed RP00.P01.M02.S03 implements only the AIControlRule tenant scope field, keeps S01 AIControlRule model and S02 primary identifier production_ready, defers HermesGate to RP00.P01.M03.S01, claims no later entities or parent closeouts, uses no real data, writes no product state, and enforces canonical lfos_ lowercase snake-case tenant IDs plus same-tenant/cross-tenant checks through normalizeAIControlRuleTenantId, validateAIControlRuleTenantId, assertAIControlRuleTenantScope, validateAIControlRule, createAIControlRule, fixture evidence, tests, and the RP00 validator. No P0/P1/P2 findings remain. Production_ready promotion is allowed after recording this review, adjudication, construction inspection, and rerunning local validations.
